mapper.insert:
insert into chat_turn(id, session_id, turn_number, user_message_id, assistant_message_id, task_id, reasoning_summary, create_time, update_time, status, reserve, remark) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.sessionId}, #{entity.turnNumber}, #{entity.userMessageId}, #{entity.assistantMessageId}, #{entity.taskId}, #{entity.reasoningSummary}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.reserve}, #{entity.remark})
